transcript:  Субтитры создавал DimaTorzok Oh, you're tall. Well, happy Halloween. I'm out of candy. You know, I can just run out to the store and get some more if you want to come back. Okay. timestamps.text:  Субтитры создавал DimaTorzok Oh, you're tall. Well, happy Halloween. I'm out of candy.
You know, I can just run out to the store and get some more if you want to come back.

Okay. I don't know. Trick or treat! Okay. Hello! Whoa! Thanks. Ahem. Thank you. Let's go carry it. Okay, I'm down. I don't know.
